title: Modern Downtown Condo
description: Stunning 2-bedroom condo in the heart of downtown Ottawa with panoramic views of Parliament Hill. Features floor-to-ceiling windows, modern kitchen with quartz countertops, and in-suite laundry. Steps from the Rideau Centre, ByWard Market, and the LRT.

title: Charming Glebe Townhouse
description: Beautiful 3-bedroom townhouse in the sought-after Glebe neighborhood. Hardwood floors throughout, renovated kitchen, private backyard, and steps from Bank Street shops, Lansdowne Park, and the Rideau Canal.

title: Kanata Family Home
description: Spacious 4-bedroom family home in a quiet Kanata cul-de-sac. Open-concept main floor, finished basement with rec room, large fenced backyard, and double-car garage. Close to top-rated schools and the Kanata Centrum shopping area.

title: Centretown Studio Apartment
description: Bright and modern studio apartment in Centretown, perfect for young professionals. Updated appliances, large windows, and excellent transit access. Walking distance to Parliament, coffee shops, and the vibrant Elgin Street.

title: Westboro Luxury Flat
description: Premium 2-bedroom flat in Westboro Village with high-end finishes. Open-concept layout, chef's kitchen with island, spa-like ensuite, and a private balcony overlooking the Ottawa River. Steps from Westboro Beach and boutique shopping.

title: Nepean Garden Suite
description: Well-maintained 2-bedroom garden-level suite in Nepean. Freshly painted, new flooring, and ample closet space. Convenient location near Merivale shopping, transit routes, and quick highway access to downtown.

title: Barrhaven New Build
description: Brand new 4-bedroom home in the growing Barrhaven community. Modern open-plan design, premium finishes, smart home features, and a walkout basement. Minutes from new LRT extension, parks, and excellent schools.

title: Orleans Riverside Townhome
description: Bright 3-bedroom townhome in Orleans with a private patio backing onto green space. Updated kitchen and bathrooms, hardwood on the main level, and a finished basement perfect for a home office. Close to Place d'Orleans and the Ottawa River.

title: ByWard Market Loft
description: Stylish 1-bedroom loft in the heart of the ByWard Market. Exposed brick walls, soaring ceilings, industrial-chic design, and an open-concept living space. Surrounded by Ottawa's best restaurants, nightlife, and cultural attractions.

title: Alta Vista Executive Home
description: Executive 5-bedroom home in prestigious Alta Vista. Grand foyer, formal living and dining rooms, gourmet kitchen, master suite with walk-in closet, and a beautifully landscaped lot. Ideal for diplomatic or corporate tenants.
